author: glottisfaun0000
text:
Newer NSFW creator site I came across. I think it's all videos.

<https://www.xxxfollow.com>

Individual videos (<https://www.xxxfollow.com/p/######>) already work generically with yt-dlp, so guessing the API is open enough to easy implement user pages (<https://www.xxxfollow.com/someusername>) and tags (<https://www.xxxfollow.com/tag/sometag>)

The media urls that yt-dlp uses start with `https://www.xxxfollow.com/media/fans/post_public/`
